nodes.name: SECURITY_FIXES_APPLIED.md
nodes.summary: Detailed documentation of security vulnerabilities and bugs fixed in the codebase, including hardcoded credentials and PII issues.

nodes.name: App.css
nodes.summary: Global application styles, including animations, card layouts, and brand-specific theme overrides.

nodes.name: App.jsx
nodes.summary: Root application component defining the router structure, animated transitions, and layout hierarchy.

nodes.name: AuthContext.jsx
nodes.summary: Authentication provider and hook managing user sessions, roles, and mock account verification.

nodes.name: ProtectedRoute.jsx
nodes.summary: Route guard component that enforces role-based access control and redirects unauthorized users.

nodes.name: CustomDropdown.jsx
nodes.summary: Reusable dropdown component with custom styling and click-outside detection.

nodes.name: Footer.jsx
nodes.summary: Application footer containing branding, navigation links, and social media handles.

nodes.name: InternshipDetailModal.jsx
nodes.summary: Modal component displaying comprehensive details for a specific internship posting.

nodes.name: LoginModal.jsx
nodes.summary: Unified login interface for all portal roles (Student, Admin, Industry).

nodes.name: Navbar.jsx
nodes.summary: Main navigation bar with responsive mobile menu and login triggers.

nodes.name: StudentProfileReviewModal.jsx
nodes.summary: Administrative modal for reviewing student profiles during application processing.

nodes.name: index.css
nodes.summary: Base CSS file importing Tailwind directives and font configurations.

nodes.name: AdminLayout.jsx
nodes.summary: Shell for the administrative portal, including a sidebar and approval inbox.

nodes.name: IndustrialLayout.jsx
nodes.summary: Shell for the industry partner portal, managing dashboard and internship postings.

nodes.name: StudentLayout.jsx
nodes.summary: Shell for the student portal, providing access to the dashboard, profile, and applications.

nodes.name: SuperadminLayout.jsx
nodes.summary: Shell for the superadmin portal, focusing on user and system management.

nodes.name: main.jsx
nodes.summary: React application entry point that renders the App component into the DOM.

nodes.name: About.jsx
nodes.summary: Informational page about the ML CoE and the internship portal project.

nodes.name: Applicants.jsx
nodes.summary: Admin view for listing and filtering internship applicants across all branches.

nodes.name: Dashboard.jsx
nodes.summary: Overview dashboard for administrators, showing key metrics and recent activity.

nodes.name: InternshipAccess.jsx
nodes.summary: Form for administrators to manage or provide access to internship postings.

nodes.name: Internships.jsx
nodes.summary: Management page for viewing and deleting internship postings from the admin portal.

nodes.name: ManageStudents.jsx
nodes.summary: Comprehensive student management interface with PDF report generation and task tracking.

nodes.name: PendingApprovals.jsx
nodes.summary: Workflow for administrators to approve or reject new industry partner registrations.

nodes.name: useAuth
nodes.summary: Custom hook to access the authentication context.

nodes.name: handleDownloadPDF
nodes.summary: Generates and downloads a student performance report as a PDF using jsPDF.
